data.reasoning: Both models failed to analyze PKGBUILD (critical build script) due to incorrect binary file classification, making security assessment impossible. No actual code was reviewed.
coverage_issues: PKGBUILD (core build script) was incorrectly skipped as binary
No review of .install files or build-time scripts if present
false_negatives: Potential risks in PKGBUILD: unsigned sources, unsafe build steps, privilege escalation
Possible install hook scripts not reviewed
learnings: Improve binary file heuristics - PKGBUILDs are text files
Prioritize mandatory review of PKGBUILD before other files
Add fallback mechanism for suspected binary files
Train models to recognize AUR package structure essentials
